zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy於1075年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Talbot25歲，母親Aimee Adeline Albini36歲。他和Lady Beatrice de Mandeville至少有3個兒子。他於1118年被列為castellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandie。他去世於1120年在英國英格蘭享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy于1075年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Talbot25岁，母亲Aimee Adeline Albini36岁。他和Lady Beatrice de Mandeville至少有3个儿子。他于1118年被列为castellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandie。他去世于1120年在英国英格兰享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

nameMeanings.name: Talbot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname. This is of much debated origin, but seems most likely to be from a Norman French personal name of Germanic origin, composed of the elements tal ‘to destroy’ + bod ‘message, tidings’. This is the surname of an ancient Irish family of Norman origin, who have held the earldoms of Shrewsbury and Waterford since the 15th century. The old word talbot, denoting a kind of hunting dog, is from the surname.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy was born in 1075, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Talbot, was 25 and his mother, Aimee Adeline Albini, was 36. He had at least 3 sons with Lady Beatrice de Mandeville. In 1118, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as castellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandie. He died in 1120, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy est né en 1075, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Talbot, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Aimee Adeline Albini, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Lady Beatrice de Mandeville. En 1118, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est castellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandie. Il est décédé en 1120, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy 1075 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Talbot 25 und seine Mutter Aimee Adeline Albini 36. Er hatte mit Lady Beatrice de Mandeville mindestens 3 Söhne. 1118, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als castellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandie aufgeführt. Er starb 1120 im Alter von 45 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy è nato il nel 1075 nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Richard Talbot, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Aimee Adeline Albini, aveva 36 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Lady Beatrice de Mandeville. Nel 1118, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come castellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandie. Morì nel 1120, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacyが1075年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Talbotは25歳，母Aimee Adeline Albiniは36歳であった。彼はLady Beatrice de Mandevilleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。1118年，43歳の時，職業はcastellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandieと記録されている。彼は1120年にイギリスイギリスで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy(이)가 1075년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Talbot(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Aimee Adeline Albini(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Lady Beatrice de Mandeville(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1118년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 castellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandie이었다. 그는 1120년 영국 잉글랜드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy nasceu em 1075, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Richard Talbot, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Aimee Adeline Albini, tinha 36 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Lady Beatrice de Mandeville. Em 1118, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como castellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandie. Ele faleceu em 1120, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy родился в 1075 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Talbot было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Aimee Adeline Albini, 36. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Lady Beatrice de Mandeville. В 1118 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии castellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandie. Он умер в 1120 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Talbot de Lacy nació en 1075, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Richard Talbot, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Aimee Adeline Albini, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Lady Beatrice de Mandeville. En 1118, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era castellan governor of castle plessis, duché de normandie. Murió en 1120, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
